title: E. Chu Optimization Technique Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step iterative process of the E. Chu optimization technique, showing how initial parameters are refined to find an optimal solution.
elements: Parameter Update via E. Chu Method
relationships: Initial Parameter Setup leads to Objective Function Evaluation
Objective Function Evaluation leads to Gradient Calculation
Gradient Calculation leads to Parameter Update via E. Chu Method
Parameter Update via E. Chu Method leads to Convergence Check
If not converged, loop back to Objective Function Evaluation
If converged, proceed to Optimal Solution
